extortion.description: Stera Chemicals is a leading distributor of raw chemical materials in Romania, serving various industries including cosmetics, detergents, paints, food, plastics, rubber, and construction. Established in 2009, the company is a member of the European Chemical Distribution Industry and offers additional services such as product division, filling, consultation, and product development. They focus on optimizing production processes for their clients and can adapt and deliver chemicals in various quantities.
